items.q: How do I pay my tuition fees?
items.a: Fees can be paid online via the Student Portal (card/bank transfer) or in person at the Finance Office. Payment deadlines are shown on your registration confirmation.
Yes, merit and need-based scholarships are available. Applications open through the Financial Aid Office within the first month of each academic year.

items.q: What happens if I miss a fee deadline?
items.a: A late fee applies after the deadline, and course registration may be put on hold until payment is made. Contact the Finance Office if you need a payment plan.
